user_stories.title: Generate Actionable Playbooks
user_stories.i_want_to: generate a step-by-step guide for a specific challenge
user_stories.so_that: I can apply the best advice from multiple episodes without manual synthesis.
acceptance_criteria: User inputs a goal (e.g., 'How to launch a B2B product').
System identifies relevant 'How-to' content across multiple episodes.
System synthesizes a structured markdown document (The Playbook) with steps, checklists, and common pitfalls.
Each step cites the source episode and expert.

user_stories.title: Export Playbook
user_stories.i_want_to: download or save the generated playbook
user_stories.so_that: I can share it with my team or refer to it later.
acceptance_criteria: Allow export to PDF or Markdown.
